
---
title: "Solution for Joshua"
output: md_document
---

example image

```{r example}  

library(tidyverse)
iris |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width, color = Species)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Iris Dataset: Sepal Length vs Sepal Width",
       x = "Sepal Length",
       y = "Sepal Width")

```
